name: Under Armour, Inc.
description: Under Armour, Inc. is an American sportswear company that designs, develops, markets, and distributes branded performance apparel, footwear, and accessories for men, women, and youth. Founded in 1996 by Kevin Plank, the company is headquartered in Baltimore, Maryland. Under Armour is widely recognized for its moisture-wicking synthetic fabrics and innovative athletic gear designed to enhance performance. The company operates globally, serving athletes and consumers across North America, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, the Asia-Pacific region, and Latin America, maintaining a strong presence in the competitive global athletic apparel and footwear market.
